scripts.dev: curl -sS https://bootstrap.pypa.io/get-pip.py | python - --break-system-packages && python -m pip install --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt && python main.py
scripts.build: curl -sS https://bootstrap.pypa.io/get-pip.py | python - --break-system-packages && python -m pip install --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt
scripts.build-exe: python -m pip install --upgrade pip && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt pyinstaller && pyinstaller --onefile --add-data "web;web" --name "BintangOCRHanziPinyin" main.py
scripts.clean: if exist dist rmdir /s /q dist && if exist server.js del /q server.js
